metadata.description: Official Massive marketplace for Claude Code. Install the Massive plugin for API knowledge and five workflow skills across equities, options, crypto, forex, indices, and futures. Pairs with the Massive MCP server (installed separately) for live API access.

plugins.name: massive
plugins.description: Massive financial data API plugin. Loads SDK knowledge into every session and adds five skills (scaffold, discover, debug, options, dashboard). Pairs with the Massive MCP server for live API access.
